title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: A video exploring how logarithmic transformations can be applied to images, using M.C. Escher's Print Gallery as a case study. The content connects complex analysis, conformal maps, and the complex logarithm to explain a mathematical phenomenon underlying the recursive structure of the artwork.
